title: POST /api/capture becomes async (returns 202)
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want /api/capture to return immediately so that the iOS Shortcut surface and the PWA capture screen feel snappy.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify pwa/src/routes/api/capture/+server.ts (created in Phase 2 US-008) to: validate input, enqueue via the Phase 3 US-004 queue, return 202 with { queue_id, queued_at } in <100ms
Auth unchanged: bearer token OR signed cookie
The PWA capture screen still shows a 'captured' toast on the 202; the user does not notice that extraction completes asynchronously a few seconds later
The chat-side add_episode tool (Phase 2 US-005) stays synchronous so the agent's response can reflect the new episode in the same turn
Verify: curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer ...' POST /api/capture returns 202 in <100ms; episode visible via search_brain within ~3s
